summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoVault Exchange. Backend APIs mostly functional (83.3% success rate), frontend UI loads correctly but has loading issues due to market data API failures.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 502 Bad Gateway and times out after 60+ seconds
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks frontend pages from loading completely, causes infinite loading states

minor_issues.issue: Sell trades occasionally fail, possibly due to balance calculation issues
minor_issues.impact: Users may not be able to sell crypto in some cases

ui_bugs.component: All authenticated pages (Dashboard, Wallet, Trade, Transactions)
ui_bugs.issue: Pages get stuck in 'Loading...' state after successful login/navigation

integration_issues.issue: Frontend waits for market prices API which returns 502 errors
Chart components show width/height errors in console
affected_selectors: Chart components in Dashboard and Trade pages

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
User registration API works (creates user with 1000 USDT)
Dashboard authentication and user data display
All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (core UI works, authentication works, but pages don't fully load)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix market prices API (/api/market/prices) which returns 502 errors and causes frontend loading issues. This is blocking users from accessing dashboard, wallet, trade, and transaction pages after login. Also investigate CoinGecko API integration issues.
